name: daymon
description: Open-source cross-platform desktop application (Electron/TypeScript) that runs Claude tasks on schedule, maintains persistent memory via SQLite, and orchestrates background AI automation using Claude Desktop or Claude Code subscriptions without requiring API keys
scan_summary: Electron/TypeScript desktop daemon. Background process execution, SQLite persistence, MCP integration. New project (11 days old at verification), background execution model warrants caution. No scripts inspected beyond config example.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.

agent_a.comment: Docs quality 9/10. README present. 12 features, 4 permissions claimed.

agent_b.comment: 94 files analyzed. Found: 2 network, 11 file, 29 env, 3 system calls. Primary: typescript.

agent_c_star.comment: 50 findings: 0 critical, 11 high, 28 medium, 11 low. No obfuscation. No injection.

agent_d.comment: Score 60. 0 mismatches. Risk: medium. Safety overrides: none triggered.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 60/100, Risk: medium. 0 mismatches, 50 scanner findings. Rejected at 60% confidence. No safety overrides.

pm_override.reason: PM batch review: score 50-69, 0 injection, 0 critical findings, no safety override triggered. Manual review not warranted — scoring system places these in MR from scanner penalty inflation, not from real security concerns.
